sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, decimal_value Nullable(Decimal(38, 10)));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, decimal_value) VALUES (1, toDecimal128OrNull('12345.6789', 10));
UPDATE test_table SET decimal_value = toDecimal128OrNull('99999.9999', 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toDecimal128OrNull('0.0001', 4) AS decimal_fixed FROM test_table;
SELECT id, toDecimal128OrNull('Inf', 2) AS decimal_null FROM test_table;
